title: scrophularia auriculata subsp. pseudoauriculata
intro: Scrophularia auriculata subsp. pseudoauriculata, a subspecies of the Scrophularia auriculata plant, is a type of flowering plant in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Scrophularia auriculata subsp. pseudoauriculata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or using them in tinctures and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
